text: FOR %F IN ("%SystemRoot%\servicing\Packages\Microsoft-Windows-GroupPolicy-ClientTools-Package~*.mum") DO (DISM /Online /NoRestart /Add-Package: "%F") FOR %F IN ("%systemRoot%\servicing\Packages\MicrosaFt—uindows—Grouppolicy—(1ientExterfions—Package~*.mum") DO (DISM /Online /NoRestart /Add-Package:"%F")
